title: Light and Tangy Brazilian Fish Bowl
description: A refreshing Brazilian dish featuring grilled fish, crispy slaw, and a hint of saffron, all steamed together for a light and flavorful meal. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: Cod fillets
ingredients.notes: Fresh, skin removed, cut into 1-inch pieces

ingredients.name: Red cabbage
ingredients.notes: Fodmap-friendly alternative to traditional slaw ingredients

instructions: Add the cod fillets to the steam basket and steam for 8 minutes, or until cooked through.
In a separate bowl, mix together the saffron threads, olive oil, grated ginger, garlic cloves, and lime juice for the marinade.
Add the shredded red cabbage and grated carrots to the marinade and toss to coat.
Transfer the slaw mixture to the steam basket with the cod and steam for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the vegetables are slightly tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped cilantro leaves and serve immediately.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice, if desired.
